headline: Synopsys (SNPS) Valuation Check After Share Price Weakness And Ansys Growth Story
summary: Synopsys (SNPS) is back in focus for investors after recent share price pressure, with the stock down 10% over the past month and 8% over the past year, despite reported revenue and net income growth. See our latest analysis for Synopsys. The recent 7 day share price return, down 8.47%, and 30 day share price return, down 9.92%, sit against a 5 year total shareholder return of 76.18%, suggesting long term holders have seen gains while near term momentum has faded. If Synopsys has you...
